name: Magicore Warrior of the Relics
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>跡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鉱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot attack unless you control an "Adventurer Token". You can only use each of the following effects of "Magicore Warrior of the Relics" once per turn. If you control an "Adventurer Token": You can Special Summon this card from your hand. At the end of the Battle Phase, if your monster that mentions "Adventurer Token" battled: You can Set 1 Trap that mentions "Adventurer Token" directly from your Deck.
mnst_eff: Cannot attack unless you control an "Adventurer Token". You can only use each of the following effects of "Magicore Warrior of the Relics" once per turn. If you control an "Adventurer Token": You can Special Summon this card from your hand. sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
